sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103408" key="tetrakisefe/bdomos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τετρᾰκισ-εφέβδομος</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λόγος</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n103408.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ratio of</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg001:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope> </bibl>:<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg001:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7</biblScope></bibl>, ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
